hero.headline: Every project. Every crew. Fully under control.
hero.subtext: Proesphere unifies your projects, crew, clients, and finances in one AI-powered hub — so you run a flawless operation instead of chasing information.
features.headline: Built for how contractors actually work.
features.1.title: Project Command Center
features.1.desc: Every task, milestone, and schedule synchronized in one view. Your crew knows what to do — without a phone call.
features.2.title: Branded Client Portal
features.2.desc: Live updates, photos, and approvals via magic link. No app, no password, no "how's it going?" calls.
features.3.title: Financial Intelligence
features.3.desc: Budgets, change orders, invoices, and payment milestones — tracked from estimate to final check.
features.4.title: AI That Understands Your Business
features.4.desc: Ask anything in plain English. Instant answers from your actual project data — not a chatbot, an intelligent co-pilot.
features.5.title: Subcontractor Hub
features.5.desc: Tasks, checklists, performance scores, and payments — all from a passwordless portal subs access anywhere.
features.6.title: Live Operations Dashboard
features.6.desc: A real-time command view of every active project — what's on track, at risk, and needs your attention.
statement.oakAve: Oak Ave window delivery closing tomorrow.
ai.headline: Intelligence built in,
ai.subtext: Proesphere's AI layer is grounded in your actual project data. It doesn't just answer — it anticipates problems before they cost you money.
ai.feature1.title: Natural language queries
ai.feature1.desc: Ask anything about your projects in plain English. No training, no setup.
ai.feature2.title: Proactive risk detection
ai.feature2.desc: Budget anomalies and schedule risks flagged before they become problems.
ai.feature3.title: Automated client updates
ai.feature3.desc: Status reports drafted and sent on your schedule, in your voice.
ai.feature4.title: Smart document parsing
ai.feature4.desc: Upload contracts — AI extracts every deadline, requirement, and obligation.
ai.chatQuery: Which projects are trending over budget?
ai.chatResponse2: subcontractor hours 18% above plan in framing phase.
ai.chatResponse3: Riverdale and Sunset Villas are both within 2% of budget.
ai.chatFollowUp: Draft a change order for Metro and notify my PM.
ai.chatResultDetail: additional framing labor. Your PM notified. Ready to send to Brightfield Corp for approval.
gauges.headline: Numbers that
gauges.subtext: Contractors who switch don't go back. Proesphere typically pays for itself in the first week.
testimonials.headline: From contractors who
testimonials.1.quote: I used to spend every Monday piecing together where each project stood. Now I open Proesphere and it's all right there. I got those three hours back — every single week.
testimonials.1.name: Marcus T.
testimonials.2.quote: My clients love the portal. They stop calling. That alone made it worth ten times the subscription cost in the first month.
testimonials.2.name: Sandra R.
testimonials.3.quote: The AI caught a budget overrun two weeks before I would have noticed. It saved us a very uncomfortable conversation — and about $40K.
testimonials.3.name: Derek O.
pricing.headline: Simple, honest.
pricing.starter.name: Starter
pricing.pro.name: Professional
pricing.enterprise.name: Enterprise
cta.headline: Run every project
cta.subtext: No credit card. No contract. No consultants. Start free in the next five minutes.
cta.disclaimer: 14-day free trial · No credit card · Cancel anytime
finalCta.subtext: Join the waitlist. Be first to experience AI that actually understands construction.
finalCta.disclaimer: No credit card required. No commitment. Just early access.
howItWorks.headline: Three steps to clarity
howItWorks.step1.title: Ask
howItWorks.step1.desc: Type your question in plain language. No menus, no navigation, no learning curve.
howItWorks.step2.title: Proesphere Works
howItWorks.step2.desc: The AI queries all your connected project data—tasks, schedules, documents, communications.
howItWorks.step3.title: You Receive
howItWorks.step3.desc: A clear answer in your preferred format. Report, summary, action list—your call.
valueShift.headline: Your time, reclaimed
valueShift.subtext: When you're not hunting for information, you're free to do what actually moves projects forward: client communication, quality oversight, team leadership.
problemReframe.text: You didn't become a project manager to chase down spreadsheets, cross-reference schedules, and manually compile reports.
intelligence.headline: Gets smarter with you
intelligence.day1.label: DAY ONE
intelligence.day1.title: Reactive
intelligence.month1.label: MONTH ONE
intelligence.month1.title: Proactive
intelligence.month1.desc: It learns your patterns. Surfaces what matters before you ask.
intelligence.overTime.label: OVER TIME
intelligence.overTime.title: Predictive
intelligence.overTime.desc: Flags risks. Predicts delays. Identifies improvements you hadn't seen.
intelligence.quote: "It notices the concrete delivery is scheduled the same day as the inspection. It flags that the electrical subcontractor hasn't confirmed next week's timeline. It sees the pattern that always leads to delays—before the delay happens."
trust.headline: Built with trust
footer.tagline: The central operations hub for general contractors. Every project, team, client, and dollar — unified and intelligently managed.
waitlistModal.title: Join the Waitlist
waitlistModal.subtitle: See how Proesphere can transform your project management. We'll reach out within 24 hours.
waitlistModal.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlistModal.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your construction management needs...
tablet.voiceQuote: Delay the foundation pour at Riverdale by two days due to rain. Notify the sub.
tablet.frame2Msg: Riverdale foundation pour moved to Mar 17. Apex Builders notified via magic link. Client portal updated with delay notice.
tablet.scheduleUpdateDetail: Foundation pour → Mar 17 · Magic link → Apex Builders · Portal updated
tablet.job1AI: Electrical sub confirmed Monday. Schedule drywall this week.
tablet.job2AI: No lumber confirmation. Framing week at risk.
tablet.job3AI: Crew unconfirmed. Permit buffer at risk by Apr 3.
tablet.job4AI: All checks passed. Thu 10am slot available.
agentDemo.s1.userPrompt: What materials need to be ordered for the electrical phase?
agentDemo.s1.aiResponse: I've analyzed the electrical phase schedule for Brookfield Estates. Here's what you need to order by Nov 28 to stay on track...
agentDemo.s2.userPrompt: What's the status on the kitchen remodel punch list?
agentDemo.s2.aiResponse: I've reviewed the punch list for the Miller Kitchen Remodel. Here are the remaining items before final walkthrough...
howItWorks.demo.prompt1: "What materials need to be ordered for the electrical phase starting Monday?"
howItWorks.demo.prompt2: "Are there any unanswered client questions from the last 7 days?"
howItWorks.demo.prompt3: "Generate a progress report for the Martinez renovation."
